calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Replace Craig A. Block As Court Appointed Receiver With Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.

PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion To Replace Craig A. Block As Court Appointed Receiver With Richard B. Cole is granted. No opposition has been filed. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Craig A. Block As Receiver
Off Calendar Dec-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:
Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Motion For Appointment Of Receiver, And To Appoint Craig A. Block As Receiver
The being no opposition, plaintiff's motion for appointment of receiver, and to appoint Craig A. Block as receiver is granted. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
